{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Imperial Capital
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Imperial Capital]] is a sprawling city located up a hill to the west of [[Candle Bay]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Imperial Capital]] contains three [[Consultant]] chapter houses.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
